title: Someone To Look Up To
author: Pumulo Sikaneta
description: A family moves into an old house and finds a stranger's forty-year journal hidden in the attic. They read it aloud across a snowed-in week. Each entry mirrors something in their own lives. A novel about the quiet, unremarked heroism that holds families together — the kind you don't recognize until you're old enough to look back and see it.
